message:
refactor: TUI clipboard, copy content, and theme lint cleanup

Simplify clipboard copy_to_clipboard match→if-let pattern in tui_app.rs
for cleaner control flow while preserving identical fallback behavior.

Fix conditional ordering in explorer.rs copyable_content() to check
empty first (positive-path-first style). Refactor search.rs
copyable_content() to use map_or_else for cleaner Option chaining.

Apply Clippy-style hex literal grouping in tui_markdown.rs FNV constants
(0xcbf2_9ce4... format). Fix doc-comment backtick escaping for range
notation in tui_theme.rs. Remove unused import in tui_ws_state.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
